curation_notes: The vulnerability is in the closed-source gl-native library bundled as a binary dependency. The patch commit only bumps the gl-native version from 10.6.0 to 10.6.1 in buildSrc/src/main/kotlin/Project.kt. No application source code in this repo was modified. The actual integer overflow occurs in the native Image constructor (visible in the archived open-source mapbox-gl-native repo at include/mbgl/util/image.hpp) where bytes() computes channels * width * height without overflow checking. Location points to the build config file that pins the vulnerable dependency version, as that is the only non-doc file changed by the patch.
